accounts.name: market
docs: There is 1 market per vault

accounts.name: vault
docs: Links the mint_sy & mint_pt & sy_program together

accounts.name: escrow_sy
docs: This account for SY is only a temporary pass-through account
It is used to transfer SY tokens from the signer to the market
And then from the market to the SY program's escrow

accounts.name: escrow_yt
docs: This account for YT is only a temporary pass-through account
It is used to transfer YT tokens from the signer to the market
And then from the market to the core program's

accounts.name: pt_src
docs: Signer's PT token account

accounts.name: sy_src
docs: Signer's SY token account

accounts.name: token_program
docs: Use Token2022 as the implementation for PT & SY & LP tokens

errors.name: TickArrayAlreadyBoundToMarket
errors.msg: Tick array already bound to market

errors.name: NoRightIndexForSplitedRange
errors.msg: No right index for splitted range

errors.name: ExactOutDirectionUnsupported
errors.msg: Exact-out swaps are unsupported for this direction

errors.name: InvalidTickRange
errors.msg: Lower and upper tick must differ

errors.name: TickRangeTooSmall
errors.msg: Tick range width below epsilon clamp

errors.name: LiquidityToRemoveExceedsBalance
errors.msg: Liquidity to remove exceeds position balance

errors.name: InvalidFeeRate
errors.msg: Fee rate configuration must not exceed 5% annualized

errors.name: DepositTooSmallToMint
errors.msg: Deposit amount too small to mint shares

errors.name: TickNotAlignedToTickSpace
errors.msg: Tick key must be a multiple of tick_space

errors.name: AddingLiquidityCurrentlyNotAllowed
errors.msg: Adding liquidity currently is not allowed

types.name: CrossingSplit
docs: Represents the three virtual segments when a position spans the active tick.
This allows tracking different liquidity (L_actual vs L_target) in the crossing segment.

fields.name: cross_left_idx
docs: Left boundary of the crossing tick (current_tick at deposit time)

fields.name: cross_right_idx
docs: Right boundary of the crossing tick

fields.name: lp_balance_crossing
docs: Actual liquidity for the crossing segment (L_actual, may be < L_target)

fields.name: amount_pt_in
docs: Total PT amount added (distributed across ticks in range)

fields.name: amount_sy_in
docs: Total SY amount added (distributed across ticks in range)

fields.name: delta_liquidity

docs: Lower tick boundary of the position

fields.name: upper_tick
docs: Upper tick boundary of the position

fields.name: token_account
docs: The token account for the emission where the vault authority is the authority

fields.name: final_index
docs: The final index is used to track the last claimable index after the vault expires

fields.name: treasury_token_account
docs: The treasury token account for this reward

fields.name: fee_bps
docs: The fee taken from emission collecting

fields.name: treasury_emission
docs: The lambo fund

fields.name: mint
docs: Mint for the emission token

fields.name: token_rate
docs: Rate at which the emission token is emitted per second

fields.name: expiry_timestamp
docs: Expiration timestamp for the emission token

fields.name: index
docs: Index for converting LP shares into earned emissions

fields.name: max_net_balance_change_negative_percentage
docs: Maximum allowed negative change in basis points (10000 = 100%)

fields.name: max_net_balance_change_positive_percentage
docs: Maximum allowed positive change in basis points (10000 = 100%)
Using u32 to allow for very large increases (up to ~429,496%)

fields.name: owner
docs: Link to address that owns this position

fields.name: market
docs: Link to market that manages the LP

fields.name: fee_inside_last_pt
docs: last fee calc position snapshot Q64.64

fields.name: fee_inside_last_sy
docs: last fee calc position snapshot Q64.64

fields.name: lp_balance
docs: Track the LP balance of the user here

fields.name: lower_tick_idx
docs: Lower tick of the position

fields.name: upper_tick_idx
docs: Upper tick of the position

fields.name: share_trackers
docs: Share trackers for each tick in range

fields.name: crossing_split
docs: Crossing split for positions that span the active tick.
When active (is_active() returns true), the position is logically split
into 3 segments with the crossing segment having reduced liquidity (L_actual).
When inactive, this field is ignored and standard fee calculation is used.

fields.name: fee_inside_last_pt
docs: Last snapshot of inside PT fee growth

fields.name: fee_inside_last_sy
docs: Last snapshot of inside SY fee growth

fields.name: token_escrow
docs: Escrow account that receives the emissions from the SY program
And then passes them through to the user

fields.name: lp_share_index
docs: Index for converting LP shares into earned emissions

fields.name: last_seen_staged
docs: The difference between the staged amount and collected emission amount

types.name: MarketFinancials
docs: Financial parameters for the market

fields.name: expiration_ts
docs: Expiration timestamp, which is copied from the vault associated with the PT

fields.name: pt_balance
docs: Balance of PT in the market
This amount is tracked separately to prevent bugs from token transfers directly to the market

fields.name: sy_balance
docs: Balance of SY in the market
This amount is tracked separately to prevent bugs from token transfers directly to the market

fields.name: sy_user_balance
docs: Balance of SY in the market without fees

fields.name: liquidity_balance
docs: Total balance of liquidity in the market

fields.name: address_lookup_table
docs: Address to ALT

fields.name: mint_pt
docs: Mint of the vault's PT token

fields.name: mint_sy
docs: Mint of the SY program's SY token

fields.name: mint_yt
docs: Mint of the vault's YT token

fields.name: vault
docs: Link to yield-stripping vault

fields.name: token_pt_escrow
docs: Token account that holds PT liquidity

fields.name: token_sy_escrow
docs: Pass-through token account for SY moving from the depositor to the SY program

fields.name: token_yt_escrow
docs: Pass-through token account for YT moving from the depositor to the core program

fields.name: token_fee_treasury_sy
docs: Token account that holds SY fees from trade

fields.name: token_fee_treasury_pt
docs: Token account that holds PT fees from trade

fields.name: self_address
docs: Authority for CPI calls owned by the market struct

fields.name: ticks
docs: Pubkey tick array account

fields.name: signer_bump
docs: Bump for signing the PDA

fields.name: sy_program
docs: Link to the SY program ID

fields.name: exponent_core_program
docs: Link to the exponent_core program ID

fields.name: cpi_sy_accounts
docs: Record of CPI accounts

fields.name: cpi_core_accounts
docs: Record of CPI core accounts

fields.name: seed_id
docs: Unique seed id for the market

types.name: Number
docs: High precision number, stored as 4 u64 words in little endian

types.name: PersonalYieldTracker
docs: Generic tracker for interest and emissions earned by deposits

fields.name: last_seen_index
docs: The index is the per-share value of the SY token
Note that the YT balance must be converted to the equivalent SY balance

fields.name: staged
docs: Staged tokens that may be withdrawn

types.name: PrincipalShare
docs: Generic tracker for interest and emissions earned by deposits

docs: tick_idx

docs: tick_idx

fields.name: split_epoch
docs: inserted_split_epoch

fields.name: lp_share
docs: lp share

fields.name: sy_program
docs: Link to SY program

fields.name: mint_sy
docs: Mint for SY token

fields.name: mint_yt
docs: Mint for the vault-specific YT token

fields.name: mint_pt
docs: Mint for the vault-specific PT token

fields.name: escrow_yt
docs: Escrow account for holding deposited YT

fields.name: escrow_sy
docs: Escrow account that holds temporary SY tokens
As an interchange between users and the SY program

fields.name: yield_position
docs: Link to a vault-owned YT position
This account collects yield from all "unstaked" YT

fields.name: address_lookup_table
docs: Address lookup table key for vault

fields.name: start_ts
docs: start timestamp

fields.name: duration
docs: seconds duration

fields.name: signer_seed
docs: Seed for CPI signing

fields.name: authority
docs: Authority for CPI signing

fields.name: signer_bump
docs: bump for signer authority PDA

fields.name: last_seen_sy_exchange_rate
docs: Last seen SY exchange rate
This continues to be updated even after vault maturity to track SY appreciation for treasury collection

fields.name: all_time_high_sy_exchange_rate
docs: This is the all time high exchange rate for SY

fields.name: final_sy_exchange_rate
docs: This is the exchange rate for SY when the vault expires

fields.name: total_sy_in_escrow
docs: How much SY is held in escrow

fields.name: sy_for_pt
docs: The total SY set aside to back the PT holders
This value is updated on every operation that touches the PT supply or the last seen exchange rate

fields.name: pt_supply
docs: Total supply of PT

fields.name: treasury_sy
docs: Amount of SY staged for the treasury

fields.name: uncollected_sy
docs: SY that has been earned by YT, but not yet collected

fields.name: amount_pt_out
docs: Total PT amount removed (distributed across ticks in range)

fields.name: amount_sy_out
docs: Total SY amount removed (distributed across ticks in range)
